name: Newbest Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the unsalted butter, brown sugar, and eggs (one at a time). Add in the corn syrup, molasses, Kahlua, vanilla extract, and salt; mix well.
2. Mix chocolate, flour, and pecans (toast for 1-1/2 minutes in microwave) and add to the rest of the ingredients.
3. Prebake pie crust for 12 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove from oven, cool slightly, and pour mixture into pie shell. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 1 hour. Cool and enjoy!
